chat.emptyDesc: Type a prompt or upload an image to begin generating content.
chat.placeholder: Describe what you want to create...
chat.faceSwapHint: Face Swap mode: image 1's face will be merged onto image 2
chat.imageRefHint: Enter instructions referencing the uploaded images...
chat.inpaintHint: 🎨 Describe what to change in the masked area...
chat.uploadRequiredForInpaint: 🎨 Please upload an image first to use Inpaint!
chat.faceSwapGuide: 📷 Image 1 = Body (Target) / 🧑 Image 2 = Face (Source) — Drag to swap
chat.faceSwapNoImage: Please upload at least 2 images for Face to Face mode.
chat.inpaintClothingHint:
Paint over clothing to remove. The AI will generate natural skin underneath.
• Images with more skin exposure have a higher success rate.
• For images with extensive clothing, repeating the process multiple times increases the success rate.
• ⚠️ Using high-quality images increases the success rate.
chat.error_safety_violation: Generation failed: This prompt cannot be used due to safety violations.
chat.error_temp_ban: Generation failed: Account temporarily suspended for repeated violations (24h).
chat.error_permanent_ban: Generation failed: Account permanently banned for strict policy violations.
chat.img2imgNoImage: ⚠️ Image upload is required for img2img mode.
chat.promptRequired: ⚠️ Please enter a prompt describing the image you want to generate (e.g. scene, clothing, background).
chat.faceSwapLimitReached: You have used your free Face Swap for today. Upgrade for unlimited access.

img2imgConsent.term0: I am 18 years of age or older.

img2imgConsent.term2: I am not using images that infringe on intellectual property rights or the rights of any third party.

firstGenModal.title: Before You Start Generating
firstGenModal.privacyPoint1: • Prompts entered are not used for AI model training.
firstGenModal.privacyPoint2: • Anonymized statistical analysis may be performed to improve filtering accuracy.
firstGenModal.privacyPoint3: • Generated images are automatically deleted after 1 hour.
firstGenModal.privacyCheck: I have reviewed and agree to the data handling policy.
firstGenModal.compliancePoint1:
All images on this service are 100% AI-generated.
No real individuals are depicted in any generated content.
firstGenModal.complianceCheck: I have read and acknowledged the statement above.
firstGenModal.prohibitedCheck: I reaffirm that I will not generate prohibited content (minors, real persons, etc.).

history.title: Generation History
history.expiryNotice: Generated images are automatically deleted after 1 hour.
history.noFavoritesDesc: Click the heart icon on images to add them to favorites.
history.loginRequiredDesc: Please log in to view your generation history.

faces.title: My Faces
faces.emptyHint: Save a face to reproduce the same character anytime
faces.noGenerations: No generated images yet. Generate some images first!
faces.nameRequired: Please enter a name for this face
faces.limitReached: Face limit reached. Upgrade to save up to 10 faces.
faces.uploadRequiresPaid: Image upload is a paid plan feature
faces.invalidFormat: Please upload JPG, PNG, or WebP format
faces.dropzoneHint: Drag & drop or click to upload
faces.uploadNotice: High quality, front-facing, well-lit photos work best. Avoid sunglasses, masks, side profiles, or distant shots.
faces.guideStep1: Tap a saved face to select it (highlighted = active)
faces.guideStep2: Generate an image as usual — the saved face will be applied automatically
faces.guideStep3: Tap again to deselect and generate without the face
faces.guideNote: Note: My Faces is not used in Face Swap or Nude Mode — those use their own images.
faces.selectHint: Tap a face to use it in generation
